meta.title: DEF CON 32 - A dive into world of Aircraft PKI - Matt Gaffney
meta.description: From protecting Aircraft Software Parts to authenticating aircraft to ground networks, aircraft use PKI in their day-to-day operations. In this talk we will cover the typical use cases, technologies, and regulations in play and touch upon the emerging threat of the Post-Quantum world and what it could mean for the protection of embedded software we find on aircraft.
